```ts
  127 |     await this.page.getByRole("option", { name: lead.industry, exact: true }).click();
  128 | 
  129 |     await this.dropdownLeadStatus.click();
  130 |     await this.page.getByRole("option", { name: lead.leadStatus }).click();
  131 | 
  132 |     await this.dropdownRating.click();
  133 |     await this.page.getByRole("option", { name: lead.rating }).click();

  135 | 
  136 |   private async selectOption(dropdown: Locator, value: string, exact = false) {
  137 |     await dropdown.click();
  138 |     await this.page.getByRole("option", { name: value, exact }).click();
  139 |   }
  140 | 
  141 |   async fillLeadFormDropdownV2(lead: LeadData) {
  142 |     const dropdowns = [
  143 |       { locator: this.dropdownSalutation, value: lead.salutation },
  144 |       { locator: this.dropdownLeadSource, value: lead.leadSource },
  145 |       { locator: this.dropdownIndustry, value: lead.industry, exact: true },
  146 |       { locator: this.dropdownLeadStatus, value: lead.leadStatus },
  147 |       { locator: this.dropdownRating, value: lead.rating },
  148 |     ];
  149 | 
  150 |     for (const dropdown of dropdowns) {
  151 |       await this.selectOption(dropdown.locator, dropdown.value, dropdown.exact);
  152 |     }
  153 |   }
  154 | 
  155 |   async saveLead() {
  156 |     await this.buttonSave.click();
  157 |     await expect(this.page.locator(".forceActionsText")).toContainText("was created");
  158 |     await expect(this.page.getByText("was created.")).toBeVisible();
  159 |     await expect(this.page).toHaveURL(this.leadRecordUrl, {
  160 |       timeout: 10000,
  161 |     });
  162 |   }
  163 | 
  164 |   async clickSaveButton() {
  165 |     await this.buttonSave.click();
  166 |   }
  167 | 
  168 |   async verifyUniqueLeadId() {
  169 |     const match = this.page.url().match(this.leadRecordUrl);
  170 |     expect(match).not.toBeNull();
  171 |     expect(match![1]).toHaveLength(18);
  172 |     expect(match![1]).toMatch(/^[A-Za-z0-9]{18}$/);
  173 |   }
  174 | 
  175 |   async deleteLead() {
  176 |     await this.buttonShowMoreActions.click();
  177 |     await this.buttonDelete.click();
  178 |     await expect(this.page.getByText("Are you sure you want to delete this")).toBeVisible();
  179 |     await this.buttonDelete2.click({delay: 1000});
  180 |     await expect(this.page.getByText("was deleted.")).toBeVisible({timeout: 10000});
  181 |   }
  182 | 
  183 |   async editLead() {
  184 |     await this.buttonShowMoreActions.click();
  185 |     await this.buttonEdit.click();
  186 |     await expect(this.buttonSaveAndNew).toBeVisible();
  187 |     await expect(this.buttonSave).toBeVisible();
  188 |   }
  189 | 
  190 |   async clickConvertButton() {
  191 |     await this.buttonShowMoreActions.click();
  192 |     await expect(this.buttonConvertMenuItem).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 });
  193 |     await this.buttonConvertMenuItem.click();
  194 |     await expect(this.page.getByRole("dialog", { name: "Convert Lead" })).toBeVisible({
  195 |       timeout: 15000,
  196 |     });
  197 |   }
  198 | 
  199 |   async editLeadStatus(newStatus: string) {
  200 |     await this.buttonShowMoreActions.click();
  201 |     await this.buttonEdit.click();
  202 |     await expect(this.dropdownLeadStatus).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 });
  203 |     await this.selectOption(this.dropdownLeadStatus, newStatus);
  204 |     await this.buttonSave.click();
  205 |     await expect(this.page.getByText("was saved.")).toBeVisible();
  206 |     await expect(this.page).toHaveURL(this.leadRecordUrl, {
  207 |       timeout: 10000,
  208 |     });
  209 |   }
  210 | 
  211 |   async clickDetailsTab() {
  212 |     await this.tabDetails.click();
  213 |     await expect(this.page.getByText("Lead Owner", { exact: true })).toBeVisible();
  214 |   }
  215 | 
  216 |   private async getTextContent(locator: Locator) {
  217 |     const text = (await locator.allTextContents()).join(" ").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
  218 |     if (text) {
  219 |       return text;
  220 |     }
  221 | 
  222 |     return (await this.page.locator("body").innerText()).replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
  223 |   }
  224 | 
  225 |   // Polls until the expected value appears within the locator's text
  226 |   private async assertFieldValue(locator: Locator, expected: string, timeout = 10000) {
> 227 |     await expect.poll(async () => this.getTextContent(locator), { timeout }).toContain(expected);
      |                                                                              ^ Error: expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf
  228 |   }
  229 | 
  230 |   private async resolveFieldValueLocator(label: string, initialValue: Locator, expected: string) {
  231 |     // Return the initial locator if it already contains text
  232 |     const initialText = (await initialValue.allTextContents())
  233 |       .join(" ")
  234 |       .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
  235 |       .trim();
  236 |     if (initialText) {
  237 |       return initialValue;
  238 |     }
  239 | 
  240 |     const labelLocator = this.page.getByText(label, { exact: true }).first();
  241 |     if (await labelLocator.count()) {
  242 |       // Locate the nearest container that holds both the label and its value
  243 |       const container = labelLocator.locator(
  244 |         "xpath=ancestor::*[self::div or self::li or self::tr or self::section or self::article][1]"
  245 |       );
  246 |       // Find non-label elements that may contain the field value
  247 |       const fallbackValue = container.locator(
  248 |         "xpath=.//*[not(self::label) and not(self::span[contains(@class, 'test-id__field-label')]) and normalize-space(.)!='']"
  249 |       );
  250 |       // Exclude elements whose text is only the label
  251 |       const candidate = fallbackValue.filter({ hasNotText: new RegExp(`^${label}$`, "i") }).first();
  252 |       if (await candidate.count()) {
  253 |         return candidate;
  254 |       }
  255 |       // Use the first available value element if no better match exists
  256 |       if (await fallbackValue.count()) {
  257 |         return fallbackValue.first();
  258 |       }
  259 |     }
  260 | 
  261 |     return this.page.locator("body");
  262 |   }
  263 | 
  264 |   /**
  265 |    * Verifies the displayed value of a Salesforce record field based on its label.
  266 |    * Optionally normalizes numeric values (e.g. Phone, Mobile, Fax) to ignore
  267 |    * formatting differences such as spaces, parentheses, or dashes.
  268 |    */
  269 |   async verifyField(label: string, expected: string, normalizeDigits = false) {
  270 |     const field = this.page
  271 |       .locator(`.test-id__field-label:text-is("${label}")`)
  272 |       .locator(
  273 |         "xpath=ancestor::*[contains(concat(' ', normalize-space(@class), ' '), ' slds-form-element ')][1]"
  274 |       );
  275 | 
  276 |     // Retrieve the displayed field value
  277 |     const value = field.locator(".test-id__field-value").first();
  278 |     const resolvedValue = await this.resolveFieldValueLocator(label, value, expected);
  279 | 
  280 |     // Compare only numeric characters for phone-related fields
  281 |     if (normalizeDigits) {
  282 |       await expect
  283 |         .poll(async () => (await this.getTextContent(resolvedValue)).replace(/\D/g, ""), {
  284 |           timeout: 10000,
  285 |         })
  286 |         .toContain(expected.replace(/\D/g, ""));
  287 |       return;
  288 |     }
  289 | 
  290 |     // Verify the displayed text matches the expected value
  291 |     await this.assertFieldValue(resolvedValue, expected);
  292 |   }
  293 | 
  294 |   async verifyDetailsView(lead: LeadData) {
  295 |     const fullName = `${lead.salutation} ${lead.firstName} ${lead.lastName}`;
  296 |     await this.verifyField("Name", fullName);
  297 |     await this.verifyField("Title", lead.title);
  298 |     await this.verifyField("Company", lead.company);
  299 |     await this.verifyField("Annual Revenue", lead.annualRevenue);
  300 |     await this.verifyField("Phone", lead.phone, true);
  301 |     await this.verifyField("Mobile", lead.mobile, true);
  302 |     await this.verifyField("Fax", lead.fax, true);
  303 |     await this.verifyField("Email", lead.email);
  304 |     await this.verifyField("Website", lead.website);
  305 |     await this.verifyField("No. of Employees", lead.numberOfEmployees);
  306 |     await this.verifyField("Lead Source", lead.leadSource);
  307 |     await this.verifyField("Industry", lead.industry);
  308 |     await this.verifyField("Lead Status", lead.leadStatus);
  309 |     await this.verifyField("Rating", lead.rating);
  310 |   }
  311 | 
  312 |   async verifyOpportunityAndAccountName(data: string) {
  313 |     await this.verifyField("Opportunity Name", data);
  314 |     await this.verifyField("Account Name", data.slice(0, -1));
  315 |   }
  316 | 
  317 |   async verifyFieldHasValue(label: string) {
  318 |     const labelLocator = this.page.getByText(label, { exact: true }).first();
  319 |     await expect(labelLocator).toHaveCount(1, { timeout: 10000 });
  320 | 
  321 |     // Navigate to the field container associated with the label
  322 |     const field = labelLocator.locator(
  323 |       "xpath=ancestor::*[self::div or self::li or self::tr or self::section or self::article][1]"
  324 |     );
  325 | 
  326 |     // Retrieve the displayed field value
  327 |     const value = field.locator(".test-id__field-value").first();
```
